content:
# Few Shot Learning

**Summary**: A machine learning subfield where a model is trained to recognize new patterns from only a few examples.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2025-ferreira|Ferreira, 2025]] utilized few-shot and one-shot learning techniques for efficient label extraction.

## Scientific Context

- [[2025-ferreira|Ferreira, 2025]] Few-shot learning is essential when only a few expert-labeled samples are available.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2025-ferreira|Ferreira, 2025]] Using pre-trained weights and limited labels to train specialized models.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The use of few-shot and one-shot learning techniques in computer vision are crucial for extracting meaningful labels from image datasets efficiently. ([[2025-ferreira|Ferreira, 2025, p. 14]])
